term: Want to slit my own throat
englishDefinitions: A highly graphic expression meaning to feel extreme frustration, disgust, or despair.
Used figuratively, not literally, to show that something feels unbearable.
persianTranslation: از شدت ناراحتی دارم دیوونه می‌شم
خیلی از این وضعیت عصبانی و کلافه‌ام
examples: I had to listen to that song on repeat, and I wanted to slit my own throat.
After the third delay, he felt like he wanted to slit his own throat.
This is a very strong, upsetting phrase and should be used carefully.
synonyms: be at the end of one's rope
